title: Wedding Speech for a Childhood Friend
title_zh: 為兒時好友獻上婚禮致詞

all.en: Standing in front of two hundred guests, I held the microphone with slightly trembling hands.
all.zh: 站在兩百位賓客面前，我握著麥克風，手微微顫抖。

all.en: Today was my childhood friend Daniel's wedding, and I had the honor of giving the best man's speech.
all.zh: 今天是我從小到大的朋友丹尼爾的婚禮，我有幸擔任伴郎並致詞。

all.en: I took a deep breath and began with the story of how we first met in kindergarten.
all.zh: 我深吸一口氣，從我們在幼稚園第一次相遇的故事開始說起。

all.en: He had shared his cookies with me on a day when I forgot my lunch box.
all.zh: 在我忘記帶便當的那一天，他和我分享了他的餅乾。

all.en: The guests laughed warmly as I described our many silly adventures during elementary school.
all.zh: 當我描述我們小學時許多傻氣的冒險時，賓客們溫暖地笑了。

all.en: I talked about how Daniel had always been loyal, generous, and full of unexpected jokes.
all.zh: 我談到丹尼爾一直以來都是如此忠誠、慷慨，並充滿出人意料的幽默。

all.en: Then I turned to his bride Lily and welcomed her into our circle of family and friends.
all.zh: 接著我轉向他的新娘莉莉，歡迎她加入我們的親友圈。

all.en: I shared how Daniel's eyes lit up the very first time he told me about her.
all.zh: 我分享了當丹尼爾第一次向我提起她時，他眼中閃耀的光芒。

all.en: My voice softened as I thanked him for being the brother I never had.
all.zh: 當我感謝他成為我從未擁有過的兄弟時，我的聲音變得柔和。

all.en: I raised my glass and wished the couple a lifetime of laughter, patience, and deep love.
all.zh: 我舉起酒杯，祝福這對新人擁有充滿歡笑、耐心與深愛的一生。

all.en: As Daniel hugged me afterward, I knew our friendship would continue into this beautiful new chapter.
all.zh: 當丹尼爾隨後擁抱我時，我知道我們的友誼將延續到這個美麗的新篇章。

all.en: After the speech, several guests came to tell me how touching my words had been.
all.zh: 致詞結束後，好幾位賓客過來告訴我，我的話讓他們深受感動。

all.en: Daniel's mother hugged me tightly and thanked me for being part of their family.
all.zh: 丹尼爾的母親緊緊抱住我，感謝我成為他們家庭的一部分。

all.en: The wedding band started to play, and the couple shared their very first dance.
all.zh: 婚禮樂團開始演奏，這對新人共舞了他們的第一支舞。

all.en: Lily invited me onto the dance floor and called me her brand new big brother.
all.zh: 莉莉邀我到舞池中央，並稱我為她全新的大哥哥。

all.en: I noticed Daniel's father quietly wiping tears while smiling at his happy son.
all.zh: 我注意到丹尼爾的父親靜靜地擦著眼淚，對著快樂的兒子微笑。

all.en: During the buffet, I caught up with old classmates I had not seen in years.
all.zh: 自助餐時間，我和多年未見的老同學們敘舊。

all.en: We laughed about silly nicknames and the school trips we had taken together.
all.zh: 我們笑談著傻氣的綽號，以及一起參加過的學校旅行。

all.en: As the night ended, I helped the staff collect lost items left by the guests.
all.zh: 夜晚將近尾聲時，我幫工作人員收拾賓客遺落的物品。

all.en: Daniel pulled me aside and gave me a small gift to thank me for everything.
all.zh: 丹尼爾把我拉到一旁，送我一個小禮物，感謝我所做的一切。

all.en: Driving home alone, I smiled at how friendship can grow even stronger over time.
all.zh: 獨自開車回家的路上，我微笑著想，友誼竟能隨著時光變得更加深厚。

all.en: A week later, Daniel sent me a heartfelt thank-you message along with several wedding photos.
all.zh: 一週後，丹尼爾傳來一則充滿真情的感謝訊息，並附上幾張婚禮照片。

all.en: Lily mentioned she had framed a candid shot of us laughing during the speech.
all.zh: 莉莉提到她把致詞時我們開懷大笑的一張隨拍裱了起來。

all.en: They invited me to dinner the following month to share stories from their honeymoon trip.
all.zh: 他們邀我下個月共進晚餐，分享蜜月旅行的點點滴滴。

all.en: Daniel showed me beautiful videos of the quiet coastal villages they had explored together.
all.zh: 丹尼爾給我看他們一起探索的寧靜海岸村落的美麗影片。

all.en: Lily had picked up basic cooking lessons from a local grandmother during their stay.
all.zh: 莉莉在旅途中向當地一位奶奶學了些基本的烹飪課程。

all.en: She insisted on cooking the seafood pasta recipe for me right there in their kitchen.
all.zh: 她堅持當場在他們的廚房裡為我做出那道海鮮義大利麵。

all.en: Watching them work side by side, I admired how naturally they moved together.
all.zh: 看著他們並肩忙碌，我欣賞他們之間自然而然的默契。

all.en: After dinner, Daniel suggested we plan a small annual reunion among the wedding party.
all.zh: 晚餐後，丹尼爾提議我們可以策劃伴郎伴娘團每年的小型聚會。

all.en: I agreed enthusiastically and offered to host the very first gathering at my place.
all.zh: 我熱情地答應，並主動表示願意在我家舉辦第一次聚會。

all.en: Walking home that evening, I felt deeply lucky to belong to such an extended family.
all.zh: 那晚走路回家時，我深深感到自己能屬於這個延伸家庭是多麼幸運。

all.en: At the annual reunion, twelve of us gathered at a charming countryside inn for the weekend.
all.zh: 在年度聚會上，我們十二個人到一間迷人的鄉間旅館共度週末。

all.en: Daniel surprised everyone by announcing that Lily was expecting their first child in spring.
all.zh: 丹尼爾驚喜地宣布，莉莉預計在春天迎來他們的第一個孩子。

all.en: We toasted with sparkling apple juice and immediately started brainstorming silly baby nicknames together.
all.zh: 我們以氣泡蘋果汁互相敬酒，並立刻開始一起發想可愛的寶寶綽號。

all.en: Lily asked me if I would consider being the godfather to their unborn child.
all.zh: 莉莉問我，是否願意擔任他們未出世孩子的教父。

all.en: My eyes welled up immediately, and I hugged her tightly as my answer.
all.zh: 我的眼眶立刻濕了，我用緊緊擁抱她的方式作為回答。

all.en: During brunch, the wedding party planned a surprise baby shower for the following month.
all.zh: 早午餐時，伴郎伴娘團策劃了下個月的驚喜寶寶派對。

all.en: We split into committees for decorations, food, gifts, and a special memory book.
all.zh: 我們分組負責裝飾、餐點、禮物和一本特別的回憶相冊。

all.en: I volunteered to write a heartfelt letter to the baby for the memory book project.
all.zh: 我自告奮勇為回憶相冊寫一封給寶寶的真摯信件。

all.en: On the drive home, I thought about how friendships create entirely unexpected new family ties.
all.zh: 開車回家的路上，我思考著友誼如何創造出全然意想不到的新家族連結。

all.en: That night, I started drafting my letter, eager to welcome this little one into our extended circle.
all.zh: 那晚我開始草擬信件，迫不及待要歡迎這個小生命加入我們的延伸家庭。

all.en: Months later, Lily called to say her water had broken and the baby was arriving early.
all.zh: 幾個月後，莉莉打電話來說她羊水破了，寶寶要提早報到。

all.en: Daniel asked me to drive his nervous mother to the hospital across the busy city.
all.zh: 丹尼爾請我載他緊張的母親穿越繁忙的城市趕到醫院。

all.en: We arrived just in time to hear the tiny cry of a healthy baby girl.
all.zh: 我們及時抵達，正好聽見健康小女嬰響亮的哭聲。

all.en: They named her Hazel and asked me to read my godfather letter aloud first.
all.zh: 他們為她取名為海若，並請我率先把教父信件朗讀出來。

all.en: Holding Hazel against my chest, I felt my whole world quietly rearrange itself.
all.zh: 將海若抱在胸前，我感到整個世界悄悄重新排列。

all.en: Daniel snapped a photo that later became my desktop wallpaper for many years.
all.zh: 丹尼爾拍下的那張照片，後來成為我多年的桌面桌布。

all.en: The wedding party arrived that weekend with handmade onesies and tiny knitted booties.
all.zh: 伴郎伴娘團當週末帶著手工嬰兒服和迷你針織小鞋抵達。

all.en: We toasted softly with herbal tea so Lily could rest without any disturbance.
all.zh: 我們以花草茶輕聲敬酒，好讓莉莉能安心休息不受打擾。

all.en: On the drive home, I thought about how love multiplies whenever we choose to share it.
all.zh: 開車回家的路上，我思索著愛在我們選擇分享時如何不斷加倍。

all.en: That night, I wrote Hazel her very first birthday letter, twelve months in advance.
all.zh: 那晚我提前十二個月，為海若寫下她生命中的第一封生日信。

all.en: Hazel's first birthday arrived faster than any of us could possibly have imagined that year.
all.zh: 海若的第一個生日來得比我們任何人想像中的都還要快。

all.en: Daniel and Lily hosted a small garden party with paper lanterns and pastel-coloured balloons.
all.zh: 丹尼爾和莉莉舉辦了一場小型花園派對，掛上紙燈籠和粉色系氣球。

all.en: I read aloud the godfather letter I had written twelve months earlier in trembling voice.
all.zh: 我以顫抖的聲音朗讀了一年前寫下的那封教父信。

all.en: Hazel reached for the page with curious tiny fingers and grabbed my heart along with it.
all.zh: 海若伸出好奇的小手指抓住了那頁信紙，也順勢抓住了我的心。

all.en: Her first birthday cake was a soft strawberry sponge that Lily had baked early that morning.
all.zh: 她的第一個生日蛋糕是一塊柔軟的草莓海綿蛋糕，是莉莉當天清晨親手烘焙的。

all.en: She smeared frosting on my nose, and the whole wedding party laughed until tears appeared.
all.zh: 她把糖霜抹到我鼻子上，整群伴郎伴娘團笑到眼淚都流出來了。

all.en: Daniel quietly thanked me for being beside their family during every important early milestone.
all.zh: 丹尼爾靜靜地感謝我，在他們家庭每一個重要的早期里程碑都陪在身邊。

all.en: I promised aloud that I would write Hazel a birthday letter every single year of her life.
all.zh: 我大聲承諾，我會為海若的每一年生日都寫一封信。

all.en: Walking home that night with leftover cake, I felt richer than I ever had before.
all.zh: 那晚帶著剩下的蛋糕走路回家時，我感到前所未有的富足。

all.en: Friendship, I finally realised, simply grows into family when we choose to keep showing up gently.
all.zh: 我終於明白，當我們選擇持續溫柔地出現時，友誼自然會生長成家人。

all.en: On Hazel's second birthday, Daniel and Lily quietly announced that she would soon become a big sister.
all.zh: 在海若兩歲生日當天，丹尼爾和莉莉靜靜地宣布她即將成為大姊姊。

all.en: I bought a tiny picture book about welcoming a sibling and read it to Hazel slowly.
all.zh: 我買了一本關於迎接弟妹的小繪本，慢慢念給海若聽。

all.en: She listened with serious eyes and then patted Lily's belly with a small protective hand.
all.zh: 她以認真的眼神聆聽，然後用一隻小小保護的手輕拍莉莉的肚子。

all.en: Six months later, baby brother Theo arrived safely on a quiet rainy autumn morning at dawn.
all.zh: 六個月後，小弟弟泰歐在一個安靜雨夜後的清晨黎明，平安降臨。

all.en: Daniel asked me to be Theo's godfather as well, and I happily accepted through joyful tears.
all.zh: 丹尼爾請我也擔任泰歐的教父，我含著喜悅的淚水欣然接受。

all.en: I began writing two birthday letters every year, one for Hazel and one for Theo.
all.zh: 我開始每年寫兩封生日信，一封給海若，一封給泰歐。

all.en: The annual wedding party reunion grew larger as more babies and partners joined our gentle circle.
all.zh: 隨著更多寶寶與伴侶加入我們溫柔的圈子，每年的伴郎伴娘團聚會也愈來愈盛大。

all.en: We rented a larger countryside inn that could host all the growing children and their grandparents.
all.zh: 我們改租了一間更大的鄉間旅館，能容納所有日漸長大的孩子和他們的祖父母。

all.en: Each year, the children performed a small play that retold the story of Daniel and Lily's wedding.
all.zh: 每一年，孩子們都會表演一齣小短劇，重述丹尼爾與莉莉婚禮的故事。

all.en: Hazel always insisted on playing me, holding a paper microphone and reading my original speech aloud.
all.zh: 海若總是堅持要演我，拿著紙做的麥克風大聲朗讀我當年原版的致詞。

all.en: When Hazel turned ten, she asked me to teach her how to write a real heartfelt speech.
all.zh: 海若十歲時，請我教她如何撰寫一篇真正動人的演說稿。

all.en: We spent quiet weekend afternoons together, drafting words for her upcoming school speaking competition that spring.
all.zh: 我們在寧靜的週末午後相聚，為她春天即將到來的學校演講比賽撰寫稿件。

all.en: She chose to write about friendship lasting decades, inspired by her parents and their old wedding party.
all.zh: 她選擇撰寫關於跨越數十年的友誼，靈感來自她父母與當年的伴郎伴娘團。

all.en: Theo helped her practice nightly, holding a small flashlight as her improvised practice spotlight on stage.
all.zh: 泰歐每晚陪她練習，舉著小手電筒當作她舞台上臨時的聚光燈。

all.en: On competition day, Daniel, Lily, and I sat together quietly in the second row of the auditorium.
all.zh: 比賽當天，丹尼爾、莉莉和我安靜地坐在禮堂的第二排。

all.en: Hazel walked onto the stage holding the same paper microphone she had once used as a toddler.
all.zh: 海若走上舞台，手裡握著她當年蹣跚學步時使用過的同一支紙做麥克風。

all.en: Her speech moved the entire room, and the principal personally thanked her with tears in his eyes.
all.zh: 她的演說感動了全場，校長甚至含淚親自向她致謝。

all.en: She won first place and dedicated the prize publicly to her godfather sitting quietly in row two.
all.zh: 她奪下第一名，並當眾將獎項獻給安靜坐在第二排的教父。

all.en: Driving home that evening, Daniel quietly told me I had become a true second father to his children.
all.zh: 那晚開車回家時，丹尼爾靜靜地告訴我，我已成為他孩子們真正的第二位父親。

all.en: I went to bed knowing one nervous wedding speech had quietly written years of meaning into my life.
all.zh: 我帶著一個體悟入睡：一場緊張的婚禮致詞，竟靜靜地在我生命中寫下了多年的意義。

all.en: The morning after the competition, Hazel asked if she could read her speech to her grandparents over video call.
all.zh: 比賽隔天早晨，海若問是否能透過視訊把她的演講念給爺爺奶奶聽。

all.en: Grandpa pretended to take notes seriously, while grandma kept dabbing her eyes with a pink handkerchief.
all.zh: 爺爺假裝很認真地做筆記，奶奶則一直用粉紅色手帕擦著眼角。

all.en: Theo announced loudly that next year he would also enter the competition, but only if I coached him too.
all.zh: 泰歐大聲宣布明年他也要參加比賽，但條件是我也得當他的教練。

all.en: I laughed and promised, then immediately started a small folder labeled Speech Coaching Notes For Theo on my laptop.
all.zh: 我笑著答應，並立刻在筆電上開了一個叫做「泰歐演講指導筆記」的小資料夾。

all.en: Hazel insisted on framing her competition certificate next to a photo of Daniel and Lily's wedding day.
all.zh: 海若堅持把她的比賽獎狀裱起來，掛在丹尼爾和莉莉婚禮照片旁邊。

all.en: Over Sunday brunch, Lily admitted she had cried so hard during the speech that her mascara had run badly.
all.zh: 週日早午餐時，莉莉坦承她在演講時哭得太兇，睫毛膏整個糊掉了。

all.en: Daniel teased her gently, saying she had been wiping her eyes through every milestone since their wedding day.
all.zh: 丹尼爾溫柔地調侃她，說自從婚禮那天起，她在每個重要時刻都在擦眼淚。

all.en: I jokingly suggested we should all start carrying tissue packs as standard godfather and parent equipment.
all.zh: 我開玩笑說我們應該把面紙包當成教父和家長的標配隨身攜帶。

all.en: Hazel slipped a small thank-you card into my coat pocket, written in her careful, slanting handwriting.
all.zh: 海若把一張小小的感謝卡偷偷塞進我外套口袋，上面是她認真又略斜的字跡。

all.en: Driving home that afternoon, I added the card to the same drawer where I kept every birthday letter draft.
all.zh: 那天下午開車回家後，我把卡片放進那個收藏每封生日信草稿的同一個抽屜裡。
